query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
-- Syria
('Damascus', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SY'), 1),
('Aleppo', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SY'), 1),
('Homs', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SY'), 1),
('Latakia', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SY'), 1),
-- Yemen
('Sanaa', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'YE'), 1),
('Aden', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'YE'), 1),
('Taiz', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'YE'), 1),
('Hodeidah', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'YE'), 1),
-- Palestine
('Jerusalem', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PS'), 1),
('Gaza', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PS'), 1),
('Ramallah', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PS'), 1),
('Bethlehem', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PS'), 1),
('Nablus', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PS'), 1),
('Hebron', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PS'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
